# Scenario (a): marker-old-only
#
# Pre-state: project has `.ndf.json` at the project root only. No
# `.ndf/cli/` directory exists.
#
# Verifies: the CLI's dual-path read fallback in loadMarker finds the
# marker at the OLD location.
#
# Expected behavior:
# - `ndf is-project`    → exit 0 (marker found via OLD-path fallback).
# - `ndf marker-path`   → prints the NEW path absolute (write-target
#                          resolver is pure-NEW; this is by design — the
#                          path the CLI would WRITE to, not necessarily
#                          where the marker currently lives).
# - `ndf config get version` → exit 0; stdout prints "4.2.0" (the
#                              version field from the OLD marker).
